sql_findings.query_summary: Identify customers and timing for 'Impossible Travel' alerts.
sql_findings.result_summary: Found 5 distinct customer accounts flagged within a 24-hour window with identical 'Identity verification failed' descriptions.

sql_findings.query_summary: Check for common IP or device fingerprints among flagged accounts.
sql_findings.result_summary: Identified that 3 of the 5 accounts were accessed from the same high-risk IP range associated with known VPN/Proxy services.

web_references.title: Impossible Travel 101 - Ping Identity
web_references.relevance: Explains the 'Impossible Travel' indicator as a primary signal for ATO.

web_references.title: 9 Account Takeover Attacks - Rapyd
web_references.relevance: Describes how automated bot networks use credential stuffing to trigger these patterns.
